languages.text: "Но Посланница не возвращалась, сколько бы молитв мы не возносили к ней. Без горячих объятий Ноллы Гордость Сантиэля погрузилась во мрак и холод, а затем... На мир обрушились Бичи Его".

traits.locale_text: "Но Посланница не возвращалась, сколько бы молитв мы не возносили к ней. Без горячих объятий Ноллы Гордость Сантиэля погрузилась во мрак и холод, а затем... На мир обрушились Бичи Его".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "Но Посланница не возвращалась, сколько бы молитв мы не возносили к ней. Без горячих объятий Ноллы Гордость Сантиэля погрузилась во мрак и холод, а затем... На мир обрушились Бичи Его".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."
languages.original_text: "Но Посланница не возвращалась, сколько бы молитв мы не возносили к ней. Без горячих объятий Ноллы Гордость Сантиэля погрузилась во мрак и холод, а затем... На мир обрушились Бичи Его".

traits.locale_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Aber die Botin kehrte nicht zurück, egal wie viele inbrünstige Gebete wir an sie richteten. Ohne Nollas glühende Umarmung stürzte Santiels Stolz in Kälte und Dunkelheit, und dann... verwüsteten seine Geißeln unsere Welt."
languages.original_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."

languages.text: "Mais la Messagère ne revint pas, malgré toutes les prières ferventes que nous lui adressâmes. Sans l'étreinte brûlante de Nolla, la Fierté de Santiel plongea dans le froid et les ténèbres, puis... Ses fléaux ont ravagé notre monde."
languages.original_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."

languages.text: "但无论我们如何虔诚祈祷，使者都没有回来。没有了诺拉炙热的拥抱 桑提尔的骄傲陷入了寒冷和黑暗 然后...他的灾祸蹂躏了我们的世界"
languages.original_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."

languages.text: "Pero la Mensajera no regresó, por más fervientes plegarias que le dirigimos. Sin el abrasador abrazo de Nolla, el Orgullo de Santiel se sumió en el frío y la oscuridad, y entonces... Sus Azotes asolaron nuestro mundo".
languages.original_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."

languages.text: 「しかし、どんなに熱烈な祈りを捧げても、メッセンジャーは戻ってこなかった。ノーラの灼熱の抱擁がなければ、サンティエルのプライドは寒さと暗闇に落ち込んだ。そして......彼の災いが私たちの世界を荒廃させた。"
languages.original_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."

languages.text: "Ama Haberci, ona ne kadar hararetli dualar etsek de geri dönmedi. Nolla'nın kavurucu kucaklaması olmadan, Santiel'in Gururu soğuğa ve karanlığa gömüldü ve sonra... Belaları dünyamızı kasıp kavurdu."
languages.original_text: "But the Messenger did not return, no matter how many fervent prayers we addressed to her. Without Nolla's scorching embrace, Santiel's Pride plunged into cold and darkness, and then... His Scourges ravaged our world."
